MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Loretta Najera. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, City Housing, Inc. Also present, Demetrice Maderis, Asst. General Manager for City Housing, Inc. Defendant, Victor Mason appeared in pro per. The matter settled per stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
